description: Global weights for household stability domains (health, food, garden, animals, environment, etc.). Higher weight = stronger influence on overall stability.

meta.scale: 0–1 per domain, relative; engine will normalize as needed.
meta.notes: These weights are used to bias planning, Now CTAs, and flow recommendations toward the most stability-critical domains.

health.label: Health & Body
health.notes: Core driver of all other domains; low health stability should strongly influence flows like health reset, sleep, hydration, and movement.

food.label: Food & Meals
food.notes: Meals, nutrition, and daily energy. Composed from cooking + storehouse + preservation metrics where available.

storehouse.label: Storehouse & Reserves
storehouse.notes: Staples, pantry, long-term reserves. Strongly affects perceived security and ability to weather shocks.

cooking.label: Cooking & Daily Meals
cooking.notes: Day-to-day meal execution (coverage, last-minute meals, use of batch cooking).

preservation.label: Preservation & Processing
preservation.notes: Buffers food security by converting fresh goods into stable reserves; critical during harvest seasons.

garden.label: Garden & Land
garden.notes: Food production, land care, and emotional connection to place; seasonally important.

animals.label: Animals & Livestock
animals.notes: Ethical care plus food/production; has safety and welfare implications when unstable.

cleaning.label: Cleaning, Order, and Visual Calm
cleaning.notes: Visual clutter and backlog heavily impact emotional stability and perceived control of the home.

finance.label: Money & Obligations
finance.notes: Bills, income stability, and obligations; included for forward-compatibility with financial tools.

schedule.label: Schedule & Time Use
schedule.notes: Alignment between commitments and capacity; impacts stress and ability to run sessions.

relationships.label: Relationships & Household Harmony
relationships.notes: Communication, conflict load, and emotional climate; forward-compatibility for future tools.

rest.label: Rest, Sleep, and Recovery
rest.notes: Sleep, Sabbath rhythms, and downtime; interacts with guards like Quiet Hours and Sabbath.

coreNeeds.label: Core Needs
coreNeeds.notes: Domains that must remain stable for the household to function at all.

homeEnvironment.label: Home Environment
homeEnvironment.notes: The visible and physical environment inside and around the home.

productionAndReserves.label: Production & Reserves
productionAndReserves.notes: Longer-term resilience through production and storage.

rhythmAndObligations.label: Rhythm & Obligations
rhythmAndObligations.notes: Time, money, and relational commitments that shape daily life.
